_comment: Cirrus Real Estate — Ollama Pipeline Configuration. Edit freely — no code changes needed.

ollama._modelNotes: Recommended: llama3.1, mistral, gemma2, qwen2.5. Larger = better JSON accuracy.

acquisitionCriteria._comment: Thresholds used for automated deal scoring (0–100)

costs._comment: All rates as decimals. Used to auto-derive missing cost fields from purchasePrice.

financing._comment: Used to auto-calculate finCosts if not in the exposé.

scenarios._comment: Multipliers applied to base case revenue for scenario analysis in Excel.
